title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Digital Marketing Manager looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Digital Technologies in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!
